system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.

{"procName":"dbo.tr_dinhmuc_history_create2","body":"CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[TR_DINHMUC_HISTORY_CREATE2] (
   @ngaythang      DATE,
   @masp           NVARCHAR (200),
   @dinhmuc        NVARCHAR (10),
   @nguoicapnhat   NVARCHAR (50)= NULL,
   @ngaycapnhat    DATETIME= NULL)
AS
--DECLARE @ngaythang date
--DECLARE @masp nvarchar(200)
--DECLARE @dinhmuc nvarchar(10)
--DECLARE @nguoicapnhat nvarchar(50) = null
--DECLARE @ngaycapnhat datetime = null

DECLARE @CNT   INT
SET @CNT = 0

IF @dinhmuc = 'GVA'
   SELECT @CNT = COUNT (id)
   FROM tr_dinhmuc_govan
   WHERE masp = @masp
ELSE
   IF @dinhmuc = 'NKI'
      SELECT @CNT = COUNT (id)
      FROM tr_dinhmuc_ngukim
      WHERE masp = @masp
   ELSE
      IF @dinhmuc = 'DGO'
         SELECT @CNT = COUNT (id)
         FROM tr_dinhmuc_donggoi
         WHERE masp = @masp
      ELSE
         IF @dinhmuc = 'SON'
            SELECT @CNT = COUNT (id)
            FROM tr_dinhmuc_son
            WHERE masp = @masp

DECLARE @trangthai   NVARCHAR (10)

IF @CNT > 0
   SET @trangthai = 'UPDATE'
ELSE
   SET @trangthai = 'INSERT'

BEGIN TRANSACTION

BEGIN TRY
   IF NOT EXISTS
         (SELECT id
          FROM tr_dinhmuc_history
          WHERE     masp = @masp
                AND ngaythang = @ngaythang
                AND dinhmuc = @dinhmuc)
      BEGIN
         INSERT INTO tr_dinhmuc_history (id,
                                         ngaythang,
                                         masp,
                                         dinhmuc,
                                         trangthai,
                                         nguoitao,
                                         ngaytao)
         VALUES (newid (),
                 @ngaythang,
                 @masp,
                 @dinhmuc,
                 @trangthai,
                 @nguoicapnhat,
                 @ngaycapnhat)
      END
   ELSE
      BEGIN
         SELECT @trangthai = trangthai
         FROM tr_dinhmuc_history
         WHERE masp = @masp AND ngaythang = @ngaythang AND dinhmuc = @dinhmuc
      END

   IF @trangthai = 'UPDATE'
      BEGIN
         UPDATE tr_dinhmuc_history
         SET nguoisua = @nguoicapnhat, ngaysua = @ngaycapnhat
         WHERE masp = @masp AND ngaythang = @ngaythang AND dinhmuc = @dinhmuc

         IF @dinhmuc = 'GVA'
            BEGIN
               IF NOT EXISTS
                     (SELECT id
                      FROM tr_dinhmuc_govan_history3
                      WHERE masp = @masp AND ngaythang = @ngaythang)
                  BEGIN
                     INSERT INTO tr_dinhmuc_govan_history3 (
                                    id,
                                    ngaythang,
                                    masp,
                                    mact,
                                    tenct_old,
                                    stt_old,
                                    nguyenlieu_old,
                                    dayy_tc_old,
                                    rong_tc_old,
                                    dai_tc_old,
                                    soluong_tc_old,
                                    ghichu_old,
                                    veneer_matchinh_old,
                                    veneer_matphu_old,
                                    mong1_old,
                                    mong2_old,
                                    veneer_dan_canh_old,
                                    veneer_canhdai_old,
                                    veneer_canhngan_old,
                                    uv_matchinh_old,
                                    uv_matphu_old,
                                    uv_canhdai_old,
                                    uv_canhngan_old)
                        SELECT newid (),
                               @ngaythang,
                               @masp,
                               mact,
                               chitiet,
                               stt,
                               nguyenlieu,
                               dayy_tc,
                               rong_tc,
                               dai_tc,
                               soluong_tc,
                               ghichu,
                               veneer_matchinh,
                               veneer_matphu,
                               mong1,
                               mong2,
                               veneer_dan_canh,
                               veneer_canhdai,
                               veneer_canhngan,
                               uv_matchinh,
                               uv_matphu,
                               uv_canhdai,
                               uv_canhngan
                        FROM tr_dinhmuc_govan
                        WHERE masp = @masp
                  END
            END
         ELSE
            IF @dinhmuc = 'NKI'
               BEGIN
                  IF NOT EXISTS
                        (SELECT id
                         FROM tr_dinhmuc_ngukim_history3
                         WHERE masp = @masp AND ngaythang = @ngaythang)
                     BEGIN
                        INSERT INTO tr_dinhmuc_ngukim_history3 (id,
                                                                ngaythang,
                                                                masp,
                                                                mact_old,
                                                                soluong_old,
                                                                truocson_old,
                                                                sauson_old,
                                                                ai_old,
                                                                ghichu_old,
																tenct_old,
																quycach_old,
																mausac_old,
                                               
-- ... (truncated)","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi_history3","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan_history3","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_history","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim_history3","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_history3","dbo.tr_material"],"writesTables":["dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi_history3","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan_history3","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_history","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim_history3","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_history3"],"flags":["has-transaction","has-try-catch","writes-multi-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
